description_long: This is a large, ornate residential house set within a fenced yard, featuring a prominent turret, multiple gabled and hipped roof sections, and a detached garage. The house is surrounded by landscaped gardens, mature trees, and shrubbery, with a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The facade includes a covered porch with columns, bay windows, and decorative trim, evoking a classic Victorian architectural style. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a driveway, a swing set, and various garden beds. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some grouped in bays and others spaced individually. The overall structure is multi-storied, with complex rooflines and a visually rich exterior.
description: A large Victorian-style house with a turret, gabled roofs, bay windows, and a detached garage, set in a landscaped, fenced yard with mature trees and garden features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, turret, covered porch, driveway, and detached garage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swing set, and the back facade of the house with garden beds.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the rounded bay windows, extensive landscaping, and the fence line with mature trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the porch, turret, and the side garden with dense tree coverage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay windows and grouped sections
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, decorative trim, steps, and a prominent main door
